name: Black Forest Cake
description:
A classic chocolate layered cake made with rich cocoa sponge.
It is filled with whipped cream and juicy cherries between layers.
The top is decorated with chocolate shavings and extra cherries.
It has a perfect balance of sweetness and slight bitterness.
Very popular for birthdays and celebrations.

name: Vanilla Cream Cake
description:
A soft and moist cake with a deep red color and smooth texture.
Made with a light cocoa flavor blended with buttermilk.
It is layered with creamy and slightly tangy cream cheese frosting.
The texture is soft, fluffy, and melts in the mouth.
A premium cake often served at special occasions.

name: Chocolate Fudge Cake
description:
A rich and dense chocolate cake with deep fudgy layers.
Made using high-quality dark chocolate and cocoa powder.
It has a moist texture with an intense chocolate taste.
Often topped with glossy chocolate ganache.
Perfect for true chocolate lovers.

name: Vanilla Cream Cake
description:
A light and soft sponge cake flavored with pure vanilla.
It is layered with smooth and airy whipped cream.
The taste is mild, sweet, and very comforting.
Perfect for those who prefer simple desserts.
Commonly used in family gatherings and tea time.

name: Strawberry Cheesecake
description:
A creamy cheesecake with a smooth and rich cheese base.
It is topped with fresh strawberry glaze and slices.
The crust is made from crushed graham crackers and butter.
It offers a perfect mix of sweet and slightly tangy flavor.
A favorite chilled dessert for summer.

name: Blueberry Cheesecake
description:
A smooth and creamy cheesecake topped with blueberry sauce.
The blueberries add a sweet and slightly tart flavor.
It rests on a crunchy graham cracker base.
The texture is rich but soft and creamy.
Ideal for dessert lovers who enjoy fruit flavors.

name: Pineapple Cake
description:
A soft sponge cake layered with fresh pineapple pieces.
It is covered with light whipped cream frosting.
The taste is sweet, fruity, and slightly tangy.
Very refreshing and not too heavy to eat.
Commonly served in summer celebrations.

name: Mango Cream Cake
description:
A tropical cake made with fresh mango puree and soft sponge.
It has layers of smooth and creamy whipped topping.
The flavor is rich, fruity, and naturally sweet.
Best enjoyed chilled for extra freshness.
Very popular during mango season.

name: Oreo Chocolate Cake
description:
A rich chocolate cake mixed with crushed Oreo cookies.
It has creamy layers combined with crunchy biscuit bits.
The taste is sweet, chocolatey, and slightly crunchy.
Often topped with extra Oreo decorations.
A modern favorite among young dessert lovers.

name: Carrot Cake
description:
A moist cake made with grated carrots and warm spices.
It includes walnuts for a crunchy texture.
The flavor is lightly sweet with cinnamon aroma.
Often topped with cream cheese frosting.
A slightly healthier dessert option.
